rows.jp: 業務の最終的な責任を負う役職。一般的には、経営者（社長）を指す。「Chief Executive Officer」の略語
rows.zh: 对业务承担最终责任的职务。一般指经营者（社长）。是「Chief Executive Officer」的缩写
rows.en: The position that bears ultimate responsibility for business operations. Generally refers to the executive (president). Abbreviation of "Chief Executive Officer"

rows.jp: 企業の4大経営資源（ヒト、モノ、カネ、情報）の1つである「情報」に関する仕事を担当する役職。CIOの主たる業務は情報システムの統括。「Chief Information Officer」の略語
rows.zh: 负责企业四大经营资源（人、物、钱、信息）之一的「信息」相关工作的职务。首席信息官的主要业务是统管信息系统。是「Chief Information Officer」的缩写
rows.en: The position responsible for work related to "information," one of the Four Major Management Resources of a company (people, goods, money, information). The CIO's main duty is the overall management of information systems. Abbreviation of "Chief Information Officer"

definition.jp: 業務の最終的な責任を負う役職。一般的には、経営者（社長）を指す。「Chief Executive Officer」の略語。
definition.zh: 对业务承担最终责任的职务。一般指经营者（社长）。是「Chief Executive Officer」的缩写。
definition.en: The position that bears ultimate responsibility for business operations. Generally refers to the executive (president). Abbreviation of "Chief Executive Officer."

definition.jp: 企業の4大経営資源（ヒト、モノ、カネ、情報）の1つである「情報」に関する仕事を担当する役職。CIOの主たる業務は情報システムの統括。「Chief Information Officer」の略語。
definition.zh: 负责企业四大经营资源（人、物、钱、信息）之一的「信息」相关工作的职务。首席信息官的主要业务是统管信息系统。是「Chief Information Officer」的缩写。
definition.en: The position responsible for work related to "information," one of the Four Major Management Resources of a company (people, goods, money, information). The CIO's main duty is the overall management of information systems. Abbreviation of "Chief Information Officer."

definition.jp: 業務を専門的な機能に分けて、各機能を単位として構成する組織
definition.zh: 将业务按专业职能划分，以各职能为单位构成的组织
definition.en: An organization that divides business operations into specialized functions and is structured with each function as a unit

definition.jp: 製品別、顧客別、地域別などを単位として、事業の利益責任をもつように構成する組織
definition.zh: 以产品、客户、地区等为单位，对事业利润负责而构成的组织
definition.en: An organization structured by units such as product, customer, or region, with each unit holding profit responsibility for its business

definition.jp: 社員が職能部門と事業部門の両方に所属する組織
definition.zh: 员工同时隶属于职能部门和事业部门的组织
definition.en: An organization in which employees belong to both functional departments and business divisions

definition.jp: 各部門から専門家を集めて結成する一時的な組織
definition.zh: 从各部门召集专家组成的临时性组织
definition.en: A temporary organization formed by gathering specialists from each department

definition.jp: 子会社の株式を保有する親会社
definition.zh: 持有子公司股份的母公司
definition.en: A parent company that holds the shares of subsidiary companies

caption.zh: 关于经营层职务名称的图1
caption.en: Figure 1 regarding the job titles of the management team
